children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Not later than 10 days after the date on which the budget of the President for a fiscal year is submitted to Congress pursuant to , the Under Secretary of Defense (Comptroller) shall submit to the Secretary of Defense, the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, and the congressional defense committees a report on unfunded priorities of the Department of Defense related to audit readiness and remediation.section 1105 of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: A summary description of such priority, including the objectives to be achieved if such priority were to be funded (whether in whole or in part).

children.label: B
children.text: The additional amount of funds recommended in connection with the objectives identified under subparagraph (A).

children.label: i
children.text: Line item number, in the case of applicable procurement accounts.

children.label: ii
children.text: Program element number, in the case of applicable research, development, test, and evaluation accounts.

children.label: iii
children.text: Sub-activity group, in the case of applicable operation and maintenance accounts.
The Under Secretary shall ensure that the unfunded priorities covered by a report under subsection (a) are listed in the order of urgency of priority, as determined by the Under Secretary.
is not funded in the budget of the President for that fiscal year, as submitted to Congress pursuant to ;section 1105 of title 31
is necessary to address a shortfall in an audit readiness or remediation activity; and

children.label: A
children.text: additional resources had been available for the budget to fund the program, activity, or mission requirement; or

children.label: B
children.text: the program, activity, or mission requirement had emerged before the budget was formulated.
